name: 单 Mac 6 节点 smoke runner
goal: 跑通 smoke-6 fake-run/dry-run 的完整路径：validate、plan、nodehost、cluster create/check、cleanup、artifacts。
pre_gate_commands: python3 -m harness.harnessctl run-scenario --inventory inventories/single-mac-dev.yaml --scenario scenarios/smoke-6.yaml --run-id p10-smoke --backend fake --json
required_outputs: run artifacts directory containing events.jsonl, run_status.json, cluster_plan.json, command log
Optional real Valkey path reports SKIPPED_RESOURCE when binary is absent; fake path must PASS
acceptance: Fake smoke run returns PASS and writes auditable artifacts
Cleanup executes on failure and success
Failures are written as events/status, not swallowed
forbidden: Do not require real Valkey for P10 pass
Do not mark optional real integration as PASS when skipped
